Procs

proc nthType1[T1, T2](a: (T1, T2)): T1
Helper proc to get first type from tuple. Used as workaround for pairs iterator 
proc nthType2[T1, T2](a: (T1, T2)): T2
Helper proc to get second type from tuple. Used as workaround for pairs iterator

Funcs

func concatSide[A, B](arg: (A, seq[seq[B]])): (A, seq[B])

Macros

macro mapPairs(inseq: untyped; op: untyped; injectNames: untyped): untyped
mapIt for object with pairs. lhs, rhs and idx are injected into scope

Templates

template mergeUniqByIt(sequence, operation: untyped): untyped
For each element in sequence apply operation and compare results. Consequent items from sequence with equal results will be added into single subsequence

Example:

assert @[1,2,3,4,4,5].mergeUniqByIt(it) ==
       @[@[1], @[2], @[3], @[4, 4], @[5]]

assert @[(1,2), (1,2), (1,4), (2,3)].mergeUniqByIt(it[0]) ==
       @[@[(1, 2), (1, 2), (1, 4)], @[(2, 3)]]
template deduplicateIt[T](inseq: seq[T]; op: untyped; isSorted: bool = false): seq[
    T]
Deduplicate values in sequence. If not isSorted and value of op cannot be compared (no operator < is defined) naive O(n^2) deduplication is used. Otherwise items are sorted and deduplicated in O(nlogn) 
template sortIt[T](sequence: var seq[T]; expr: untyped): untyped
template twoPassSortByIt(sequence, operation1, operation2: untyped): untyped
Sort input sequence using firt operation1, then group into 2d-sequence based on result of operation1 and sort each subsequence using operation2

Example:

# Sort by first field and then by second
assert @[(1,2), (1,9), (4,32), (1,3)].twoPassSortByIt(it[0], it[1]) ==
       @[@[(1, 2), (1, 3), (1, 9)], @[(4, 32)]]
template groupByIt(sequence, op: untyped): untyped
template mapPairs(inseq: untyped; op: untyped): untyped
template mutMapIt(s: typed; op: untyped): untyped
template foldlTuple(sequence, operation: untyped): untyped
template findIt(s: typed; op: untyped): int
Find first element of the sequence for which op evaluates as true and return it's index. If no such element is found return -1 
template findItFirst(s: typed; op: untyped): untyped
template findItFirstOpt(s: typed; op: untyped): untyped
